name: MedPiper Technologies, Inc
long_description:
OrbitCover (by MedPiper Technologies, YC S20) is parametric settlement infrastructure. We enable insurers and distributors to offer auto-settling protection products where claims resolve in minutes, not weeks, triggered by verifiable events with zero human intervention.

Live today in travel: flights on IndiGo auto-settle delay payouts via UPI in under 5 minutes. ~49,000 policies/day. We operate as an MGA with 25-30% commission economics and no balance sheet risk, licensed under IRDAI.
We're expanding into Guaranteed Compute (parametric downtime coverage for GPU infrastructure) and building toward vertical-agnostic parametric rails.

Core things we deliver:
Event-triggered, sub-5-minute settlement
Vertical-agnostic parametric binding protocol (VerticalBinding)
Dual-mode pricing engine with real-time actuarial calibration
Full insurer/reinsurer integration (product filing, claims ops, regulatory compliance)
